candidate_summary: ILPAYIANI-CONSENSUS: age-weighted ballots + KS-distance basin-stability termination + multi-round refinement

results_analysis.title: Multi-Agent Debate LLM Judges Adaptive Stability Detection (2025/10)
results_analysis.reason: Direct overlap: KS-statistic adaptive stability + multi-round multi-agent debate; candidate explicitly admits 'Differs from ... Multi-Agent Debate (Beta-Binomial stability)' yet borrows the same KS-based stability termination core mechanism.

results_analysis.title: RECONCILE Round-Table Conference (ICLR 2024)
results_analysis.reason: RECONCILE already does confidence-weighted voting in multi-agent round-table; candidate's prior-calibrated weighted ballots overlap directly.

results_analysis.title: Ranked Voting Self-Consistency LLMs (ACL 2025)
results_analysis.reason: Ranked voting self-consistency overlaps with weighted-ballot aggregation across agents.

results_analysis.title: Multi-Agent Debate Frameworks Overview
results_analysis.reason: Frameworks already include calibrated-confidence weighted voting in multi-agent debate.

results_analysis.title: Confidence Calibration Rationalization LLMs Multi-Agent Deliberation (2024)
results_analysis.reason: Confidence calibration via multi-agent deliberation overlaps with prior-calibrated weights in iterative agent voting.

results_analysis.title: Debate or Vote Better Decisions Multi-Agent LLMs (NeurIPS 2025)
results_analysis.reason: Directly studies vote vs debate decision aggregation in multi-agent LLMs.

verdict_sentence: FAIL: ILPAYIANI-CONSENSUS is a recombination of existing prior art with 6 hits (notably arxiv 2510.12697 which already combines KS-statistic stability detection with multi-round multi-agent debate, plus RECONCILE confidence-weighted voting and Ranked Voting Self-Consistency), so the candidate is not sufficiently novel.
